channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Biweekly / Devs
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Devs (Biweekly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #1 — March 2 to March 16, 2026 · Devs Edition
item.description: The past two weeks have been all about agentic maturity across the Copilot ecosystem. From custom agents and hooks reaching GA in JetBrains to code review landing in the CLI and a new SDK for embedding execution in your own apps, GitHub is steadily turning Copilot into a composable platform — not just a chat assistant, but an extensible runtime developers can shape and control.
